pi_items.source: docker-compose.yml line 22: image nuxeo:10.10. Verified on Docker Hub that this is a real released version with multiple tags (10.10, 10, LTS-2019, LTS).
docker-compose.yml line 6: postgres:11 image, and line 27 NUXEO_DB_TYPE=postgresql. Verified on Docker Hub that PostgreSQL 11 is a real released version.
docker-compose.yml line 25 port mapping 8080:8080. Used consistently in all task scripts (task_utils.sh line 6, setup_nuxeo.sh line 9, verifier.py line 18)
setup_nuxeo.sh line 10, task_utils.sh lines 7-8, verifier.py line 17. Credentials used consistently in all API authentication calls.
task_utils.sh line 6, setup_nuxeo.sh line 9, verifier.py line 18. URL used consistently throughout all scripts and verifier.
task_utils.sh line 12, setup_nuxeo.sh line 261. Web UI URL used for browser navigation.
task_utils.sh line 58, setup_nuxeo.sh lines 45 and 52, verifier.py line 18. REST API base endpoint used consistently in all API calls.
docker-compose.yml line 35 NUXEO_PACKAGES=nuxeo-web-ui. Verified from Nuxeo documentation as the standard web UI package.
task.json description line 5, setup_task.sh line 13-20 creates jsmith user, setup_nuxeo.sh lines 245-249 creates jsmith with firstName='John', lastName='Smith', email='jsmith@acme.com'
task.json description line 5, setup_task.sh line 40 navigates to Projects workspace, setup_nuxeo.sh lines 150-156 creates Projects workspace with title 'Projects'
setup_task.sh line 24 uses Document.RemoveACL API call on this path, line 40 navigates to this path, verifier.py line 18 queries this path's @acl endpoint
task.json description line 5 explicitly states 'Read permission', verifier.py lines 38 checks for permission in ['Read', 'ReadWrite', 'Everything']
verifier.py line 18 uses /@acl endpoint at /api/v1/path/default-domain/workspaces/Projects/@acl. Verified from Nuxeo REST API documentation that @acl is the standard web adapter for accessing ACLs.

pi_items.verified_value: Synthetic PDF files generated with ReportLab
pi_items.source: Data directory contains 4 PDF files (annual_report_2023.pdf, project_proposal.pdf, q3_status_report.pdf, quarterly_report.pdf). File analysis shows PDF header indicates 'ReportLab Generated PDF document (opensource)'. Files are valid PDF 1.4 format but content is programmatically generated.
task.json file structure contains: id, version, env_id, description, init, hooks, success. NO 'metadata' field present in the JSON object.

privileged_info_summary: The task 'grant_permissions@1' requires granting Read permission to user 'jsmith' on the 'Projects' workspace in Nuxeo Platform 10.10, which is a real software version from Docker Hub. The task uses a verified infrastructure stack: PostgreSQL 11 database, Nuxeo 10.10 Docker image, port 8080, and Administrator credentials (Administrator:Administrator). The REST API endpoint is http://localhost:8080/nuxeo/api/v1, with ACL management via the @acl web adapter. The workspace path is /default-domain/workspaces/Projects. The environment includes synthetic but real PDF data files (generated with ReportLab). The task.json contains no metadata field to verify.
